title: Practical Byzantine Fault Tolerance
content:
- ### OntologyBlock
- ## About Practical Byzantine Fault Tolerance
  - Hyperledger Fabric (option), Zilliqa
  - Seminal paper at OSDI 1999 made BFT practical for real-world systems.

ontology.definition: A consensus algorithm providing high-performance Byzantine state machine replication, processing thousands of requests per second with sub-millisecond latency increases. Designed for asynchronous systems with low latency optimization.
